S

sendToAllClients(Object) - Method in class src.ocsf.server.AbstractServer
Sends a message to every client connected to the server.
sendToAllClients(Object) - Method in class src.ocsf.server.ObservableServer
Sends a message to every client connected to the server.
sendToClient(Object) - Method in class src.ocsf.server.ConnectionToClient
Sends an object to the client.
sendToServer(Object) - Method in class src.ocsf.client.AbstractClient
Sends an object to the server.
sendToServer(Object) - Method in class src.ocsf.client.ObservableClient
Sends an object to the server.
SERVER_CLOSED - Static variable in class src.ocsf.server.ObservableServer
The string sent to the observers when the server has closed.
SERVER_STARTED - Static variable in class src.ocsf.server.ObservableServer
The string sent to the observers when the server has started.
SERVER_STOPPED - Static variable in class src.ocsf.server.ObservableServer
The string sent to the observers when the server has stopped.
setBacklog(int) - Method in class src.ocsf.server.AbstractServer
Sets the maximum number of waiting connections accepted by the operating system.
setBacklog(int) - Method in class src.ocsf.server.ObservableServer
Sets the maximum number of waiting connections accepted by the operating system.
setHost(String) - Method in class src.ocsf.client.AbstractClient
Sets the server host for the next connection.
setHost(String) - Method in class src.ocsf.client.ObservableClient
Sets the server host for the next connection.
setInfo(String, Object) - Method in class src.ocsf.server.ConnectionToClient
Saves arbitrary information about this client.
setPort(int) - Method in class src.ocsf.client.AbstractClient
Sets the server port number for the next connection.
setPort(int) - Method in class src.ocsf.client.ObservableClient
Sets the server port number for the next connection.
setPort(int) - Method in class src.ocsf.server.AbstractServer
Sets the port number for the next connection.
setPort(int) - Method in class src.ocsf.server.ObservableServer
Sets the port number for the next connection.
setTimeout(int) - Method in class src.ocsf.server.AbstractServer
Sets the timeout time when accepting connections.
setTimeout(int) - Method in class src.ocsf.server.ObservableServer
Sets the timeout time when accepting connection.
src.ocsf.client - package src.ocsf.client
 
src.ocsf.server - package src.ocsf.server
 
stopListening() - Method in class src.ocsf.server.AbstractServer
Causes the server to stop accepting new connections.
stopListening() - Method in class src.ocsf.server.ObservableServer
Causes the server to stop accepting new connections.
